subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto a handmaiden from among the handmaidens of God, that she may render thanks unto her Lord at all times [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا امة من اماء الله لتشکر ربها فیکل الاحیان
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement
